Peeky organizes your web history and helps you get to what you want.

Close all the tabs. Peeky will bring you back to the point

Introducing Peeky - No more sifting through numerous tabs to find your way back to where you left off. You can boost your productivity by remembering less and doing more. 

📍How it works

When you browse the internet or read an article, Peeky will organize the list where you visit. That way, you can power through interruptions and pick up right where you left off, without missing a beat.

⭐️Key Feature⭐️

SELF-ORGANIZED
Peeky automatically organizes the pages you visited, by keyword and app. No need for manual sorting.
    

NO MANUAL INTEGRATION
Peeky works with any app right after installation. Ready to use.
    

UNIVERSAL SEARCH
Centralize all the findings. No more back and forth.
    
👉 Check out our website for more information: https://getpeeky.app/

👉 We’d love to hear about your questions or feedback: getpeeky@gmail.com
View your history in a timeline format that shows time spent. Search through website contents as well as title and URL.

The only history manager that makes life easier, not harder.

______________________________________________

Tired of spending hours scrolling through Chrome history trying to find that one website you browsed two weeks ago? Getting frustrated sorting through endless irrelevant websites and irrelevant pop-up sites just to find that one article you viewed roughly two weeks ago? 

Introducing TimeTrace — your personalized database designed to help you navigate your browsing history like never before.

TimeTrace is a web extension that presents all of your browser history as an intuitive and informative timeline. Our extension not only allows you to see exactly how much time you’ve spent on each website and better understand your browsing habits, but it also allows you to search for the content of any site you've browsed. 

______________________________________________

Features include:
- A powerful search bar that allows you to search browsed website content in addition to site title and URL.
- A continuous timeline that shows all browser activity and time spent on each website.
- Timeline automatically folds URLs from the same domain together, with the option of hiding irrelevant browsing activity (hide sites visited for less than 5s).
- Easily go to any day that has browsing history and view your timeline.

______________________________________________

Upcoming features:

We are currently working on automatic AI summaries for timeline events.

In the near future, we will be offering an AI co-pilot that helps you find any content on any website you’ve ever browsed using TimeTrace.

______________________________________________

Data privacy:

TimeTrace does not store any user personal information. All user data are stored locally. For more information, please view our privacy policy: https://docs.google.com/document/d/12rHAdt82dFMD0kItUu2Y1aHOkg0b7LzJzEfgLlY5SIo/edit?usp=sharing

______________________________________________

Love TimeTrace? Join our discord community!
https://discord.gg/fEtJCzYQ5M

Tab Master - Save Tabs, Auto Organize & RAM Saver
Save & restore tabs instantly. Auto-organize, suspend tabs to save RAM, search sessions. Free local tab & session manager.

Got 50+ tabs open? Stop the chaos.

Tab Master is your free tab manager that organizes your browser in one click - auto-categorize, suspend unused tabs to save RAM, and restore sessions instantly.

Everything stays on your device. No tracking. Zero data collection.


KEY FEATURES:

Instant Save & Restore Sessions
Save all open tabs as a single session with one click. Restore them anytime - all together or pick what you need.

Smart Auto-Categorization
Automatically sorts tabs into Work, Shopping, Entertainment, Development, Learning, Social Media, and more. Find what you need instantly.

Memory Saver
Automatically suspend idle tabs to free up 60-80% RAM. Your laptop won't sound like a rocket anymore.

Lightning-Fast History Search (v1.4.0)
Search your entire browser history in 0.2 seconds. Find that article from 3 months ago instantly. Turn old tabs from history into saved sessions.

Smart Suggestions (v1.4.0)
Learns your browsing habits. After a few days, suggests saving tabs you open together regularly.

Duplicate Tab Detection (v1.4.0)
Automatically detects and closes duplicate tabs. Stop wasting memory on multiple copies of the same page.

Quick Session Search
Search across all saved sessions in milliseconds. Real-time results as you type.

Floating Restore Button
Small button on every page for one-click access to any saved session.

Automatic Backup & Crash Recovery
Auto-backup every 5 minutes. Chrome crashed? Everything's still there when you restart.

Export & Import Sessions
Save sessions as JSON files. Move them between computers or share with your team.

Keyboard Shortcuts
Alt+Shift+S opens Tab Master
Alt+Shift+Q quick saves everything
Ctrl+F searches your sessions

Complete Privacy
Everything stored locally on your machine. No servers involved. Your browsing data never leaves your computer.

Language Support
Works in English and Arabic with full RTL support.

Dark Mode
Switches automatically based on your system settings.


Perfect For:

Researchers managing multiple projects
Developers switching between codebases
Students organizing course materials
Anyone working with 20+ tabs daily
People tired of their computer sounding like it's taking off


Performance:

Opens in under 200ms
Search results show up in under 100ms
History search takes 0.2 seconds
Handles thousands of tabs without slowing down
Uses less than 50MB memory
Built with vanilla JavaScript for maximum performance


FREE TO USE

Everything works right now. Considering adding optional cloud sync later for people who want multi-device support. Core features staying free regardless.


LATEST VERSION (1.4.0):

Added history search - finds anything in your browsing history in 0.2 seconds
Smart pattern detection - suggests saving tabs you open together regularly
Duplicate tab detection - automatically closes copies
Create sessions from old browser history
Various performance improvements

Usually respond within 24 hours.

Open issue in Jira by keyboard shortcut or by highlight and right click context menu. Omnibox. Recently visited issues.

This extension allow users to open issues in Jira by:

1. Clicking on the extension icon and providing issue id like 56 or SOC-56
2. Choosing option from the context menu by right click after selecting the issue id. This is helpful when the story/issue id is mentioned in email or pull requests etc.. User can just select the issue id and right click to open issue in jira.
3. Supports keyboard shortcuts. (A) Alt+J to open issue opener popup (B) Alt+Shift+J to open the selected/highlighted issue id in jira directly
4. Supports Omnibox. In the address bar type J + TAB then issue id to open issue in current tab. This also suggests matching issues.
5. See recently visited issues. 


* This extension does not make any api calls to JIRA
** This extension does not share any data with the extension developer

Save, share, and find bookmarks in one click. Personal collections and shared team workspaces, with fast import and instant search.

Bookmarks are a necessary evil. Lost in folders. Buried in browsers. Impossible to share. Almost no one bookmarks the way they actually want to — and almost no one can collaborate on bookmarks with their team, family, or friends.

Bookmark It fixes that.

It's the only bookmarking app that combines real ease of use, real organization power, and real collaboration in a single place — for yourself, your team, and everyone in between.

🚀 Get started in seconds
● One-click import from your existing Chrome bookmarks bar
● One-click import from your browser history
● No spreadsheets, no copy-paste, no re-saving
● Free plan with no credit card. Ever.

👤 Personal  +  👥 Team workspaces
● Keep a private collection just for you
● Spin up a shared workspace for your team, family, or side project
● Invite anyone in seconds — everyone sees the latest version, every time
● No more "send me that link again" in Slack, Messages, or email

🔍 Find anything in one click
● Recently Viewed history puts the page you're looking for one click away
● Instant search across every bookmark in every workspace
● Collections, tags, and notes that scale from 10 bookmarks to 10,000

📌 Bookmark from anywhere
● Browser extension — save the active tab with one click
● Menubar app — save and search without leaving what you're doing
● Web app — organize and manage from any device
● Title, URL, and page details pre-filled so saving really is one click

💬 Built for collaboration
● Share entire collections, not just single links
● Add notes and context so teammates understand why a bookmark matters
● Organize together — for work projects, family hubs, reading lists, travel planning, recipe collections, anything

🪄 More than a bookmark manager
● Boosted productivity — spend less time searching, more time doing
● Onboarding made easy — new teammates get the full knowledge hub on day one
● Cross-platform — your bookmarks follow you across browsers and devices
● Upstream from the browser into a dedicated app you'll actually open

Stop losing links in chat threads. Stop emailing yourself URLs. Stop maintaining bookmarks five different places. Bookmark It is the home for every link that matters — personal, professional, and everything in between.

🔒 Privacy first
● We will never sell or share your data
● Imports are optional and read-only — we never modify your native browser bookmarks
● Page content is never sent to our servers

Try Bookmark It today, free, forever.

An extension for the Rivet Denials Management tool to help you quickly appeal denials on online payer portals.

Rivet Payer Portal Automator, an extension for the Rivet Denials Management tool, uses the information in Rivet to help you quickly appeal denials on online payer portals.

The days of spending 5 minutes trying to find the right claim to appeal are over. The Payer Portal Automator pulls claim information from Rivet and auto-fills the search fields on online payer portals so you can find the right claim in 30 seconds or less. Once you’ve enabled the extension on a payer website, just click on any field and a drop-down will appear with the corresponding fields in Rivet. Select an option and Rivet will fill that field in for you.

Seamless transition from Rivet to payer portal:
- Payer Portal Automator automatically loads the last claim you viewed
- Search for other claims if you want to appeal in batches

No more copy and paste:
- Select the Rivet field that matches the search field
- Payer Portal Automator automatically suggests the closest matches
- Search for fields that are more complex within the dropdown itself

Activate this extension to download your Chrome search history for up to a month with just one click.

Revolutionize your previous searches with our Download chrome history extension! In one click, easily get your entire Chrome search history for the last month or any week with the date and time. 
With the help of this tab, you can analyze your research, track browsing trends, and categorize your findings for easier access to information for a more enjoyable and efficient browsing experience.

Key Features of this Chrome extension:
	One-Click Download: You can easily download the entire history of your Chrome search for the last one month within the blink of an eye.
	Detailed Timestamps: This helps ensure that if a particular activity is searched, the time it took place will be given to the minute.
	Trend Analysis: Self-assess your patterns and trends of browsing the net to find out more about your Internet usage.
	 Easy Organization: Simplify your work, save resources, and optimize your search process to be able to find all the information you have searched for to date with the click of a button.


How to Use: 

1. Install the Extension
•	Go to www. chrome. com/webstore and click on the “Add to Chrome” button to install the extension to Chrome browser.
2. Open the Extension
•	To interact with this extension, activate the extension by clicking the icon in the Chrome toolbar and then selecting the features available.
3. On this page you can Download Your Search History
•	If you want to download the history of your searches to refer to them later and to have timestamps as well, you should click on the “Download History” button.
4. Analyze and Organize
•	Right click on the downloaded file to check the search history, evaluate the tendency of browsing and sort the results if necessary.
 

Why is It Useful?

This Chrome extension enables users to download their searches' history in time for convenience and helps the pupils monitor their browsing habits and findings. It makes it easier for you to manage your activities on the internet and makes sure you do not lose any data.

To whom Is It Beneficial?

This extension will be a valuable tool for researchers, students, professionals, and any busy user who conducts a lot of searches online. It plays a crucial role in the systematic management of research, and monitoring of the information seeking and acquisition procedures.


FAQs

1. Which process should I follow to install the extension?
Go to the Chrome Web Store and type the extension in the search bar, then click on the button that says, ‘Add to Chrome’.

2. Which data is available for download with this extension?
It is possible to export all your activity data from the past month, where you can find the exact time, you did the search.

3. Is my Search History data safe?
Yes, your search history is saved on your device as a downloaded file, so your data is safe and protected.

4. Is it possible to select the time range of search history to download?
It is important to note that the extension can export the search history of the last month only. Possible updates may also include the ability to select an individual time.

5. I understand that the downloaded search history can be used in many ways, but how can I use it?
The downloaded file is helpful for the repeated examination of past searches, browsing histories, and information that is stored for research or other uses.

Mark LinkedIn Profiles, collaborate with your team, boost your X-ray search, and say no more to repeated candidates!

How it exactly works:

LinkedIn: 
dotLinker equips your LinkedIn with an additional interface. Your sourcing CRM is now integrated directly into a candidate's profile, where you spend most of your time. You can leave notes, assign candidate processes, and mark their status in a customizable pipeline.

Google Search: 
dotLinker saves you precious time from analyzing candidates' profiles again. The interface with all insights is also visible in Google Search Results. When you type your Boolean Search query, all your notes will be visible near the link to the candidate’s profile.

Candidate’s Popup: 
A comprehensive popup is integrated both in LinkedIn and Google. One click shows you the full, detailed candidate’s history.

Multi-user collaboration: 
In dotLinker, you can create workspaces and invite your colleagues to them. Every note and comment made in a workspace is available to all members. Every search can be a strategic, collaborative mission.

Timestamps: 
Near every profile, you can see a timestamp informing you when you last visited the candidate’s profile. The timestamp uses your browser history; no browsing data is sent to any server.

Effortlessly manage your tabs through user-defined configurations or let our advanced AI intelligently group them for you.

Welcome to Group Your Tabs++!

Tired of getting lost in a sea of tabs? Group Your Tabs++ is here to help you organize and streamline your browsing experience! With exclusive features and built-in AI, this extension is designed to boost productivity, organization, and control over your tabs in an easy and intuitive way.

Key Features:
AI-Powered Automatic Grouping: By entering your OpenAI API key in the extension settings, you enable automatic tab organization into groups, helping you gather related content and save time. With AI’s support, tab grouping becomes more intuitive and efficient.

Customizable Group Configuration: Create your own groups with specific names, colors, and orders to organize your tabs however you like. The drag-and-drop interface allows for easy group rearrangement. Set keywords and tags for each group, and the extension will automatically sort your tabs into them. Need to delete a group? Just click the minus icon.

Group Saving and Importing: In the Data Settings menu, you can save your groups and AI-generated groups and easily import them into other browsers. This way, your organization remains consistent no matter where you’re browsing.

Enhanced Tab Search Dashboard: With the shortcut Control + Shift + F (or Command + Shift + F on Mac), you can access an efficient search dashboard. Quickly find open tabs by entering a search term or directly selecting a group. If there are no open tabs matching your search term, you can open a new tab directly from the dashboard.

Group Your Tabs++ was developed for anyone looking to optimize their browsing experience and avoid tab overload. Try it out and see how it can transform your browsing, saving you time and helping you quickly access the content that truly matters!

Try Group Your Tabs++ now and take your browsing to the next level!
Automatically removes URLs from browser history for specified domains

Hide From History

Take control of your browsing history with Hide From History! This simple yet powerful extension allows you to prevent specific websites from appearing in your Chrome history.

Features:

Add any domain to your personal “hidden list.”

Automatically hides visits to listed websites from Chrome history.

Easy-to-use interface for managing your hidden sites.

Lightweight and privacy-focused — nothing is tracked or shared.

Why use it?
Keep your browsing history clean and private. Whether it’s for personal privacy, work, or just tidying up your history, Hide From History gives you full control over what appears in your Chrome history.

How it works:

Open the extension and add the domains you want to hide.

Browse as usual — visits to those domains will not appear in your history.

Manage your hidden list anytime with just a few clicks.

Protect your privacy and declutter your browsing history effortlessly with Hide From History!

下载路径规则配置 - Smart Download Organizer
根据域名、文件类型和日期整理您的下载文件 - automatically organizes your downloaded files by domain,file type,and date,keeping your downloads tidy.

## 智能下载管理器 - 自动整理您的下载内容

厌倦了杂乱的下载文件夹？**Smart Download Manager** 自动根据域名、文件类型和日期整理您的下载文件，节省您的时间并保持下载内容井然有序。

### 主要功能：
- **按域名自动分类下载文件**（例如：从 'example.com' 下载的文件保存到 'Example/Documents/'）
- **为特定域名自定义规则**，支持通配符（如 '*.example.com'）
- **按文件类型**（图片、文档、压缩包等）**和日期**（YYYY-MM-DD）**整理**
- **灵活的默认设置**，处理未匹配的下载
- **简洁直观的配置界面**
- **支持多语言**

使用 Smart Download Manager，告别手动整理下载文件的烦恼。立即安装，享受完美有序的下载文件夹！

## Smart Download Manager - Organize Your Downloads Automatically

Tired of messy download folders? **Smart Download Manager** automatically organizes your downloaded files by domain, file type, and date, saving you time and keeping your downloads tidy.

### Features:
- **Automatically categorize downloads by domain** (e.g., downloads from 'example.com' go to 'Example/Documents/')
- **Customizable rules for specific domains**, including wildcard support (e.g., '*.example.com')
- **Organize by file type** (Images, Documents, Archives, etc.) **and date** (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Flexible default settings** for unmatched downloads
- **Clean and intuitive configuration interface**
- **Supports multiple languages**

With Smart Download Manager, you can say goodbye to manually sorting your downloads. Install now and enjoy a perfectly organized download folder!
